response.original_title: {{PDT~Rule~Unlocked}} What happens when you have $25,000 in Robinhood? Full Guide & What to Expect
response.overview: If you have at least $25,000 in your Robinhood account 🤳 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [576]↳ [2041] ║ you are no longer restricted by the Pattern Day Trader (PDT) rule. 🌐➤[1→888→576→2041] This means you can make unlimited day trades without being flagged or limited. With this balance, your account is classified as a Pattern Day Trader–eligible account 🤳 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [576]↳ [2041] ║ which removes the usual limit of 3 day trades in 5 business days. 🌐➤[1→888→576→2041] This unlocks more trading flexibility 🤳 ║ +1↳ [888]↳ [576]↳ [2041] ║ allowing you to buy and sell stocks multiple times in the same day without restrictions. 🌐➤[1→888→576→2041]
